name: Chicken Rosemary with Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice potatoes into 1/4 inch thick pieces and cook in microwave until tender (about 8 minutes).
2. In a large skillet, heat oil on high heat.
3. Brown chicken for about 5 minutes.
4. Add garlic and cook until fragrant.
5. Stir in rosemary and cook for an additional minute.
6. Add potatoes to the skillet and stir to combine.
7. Cook until the potatoes are lightly browned.
8. Season with salt and pepper before serving.
